title: add libpod.conf man page (closes #537)
body: saw this todo open, thought i'd take a whack at it. anything i should add (e.g. SEE ALSO section, or...)?

comments.body: You will have to fix the Makefile to install into man5 as well as man1.  Probably want to rename all of the existing man pages to 1.md files.
Also need to update the spec file in contrib/spec/podman.spec.in
@nathwill Missing a signoff on the commit, can you sign with -s and force-push?

:pushpin: Commit 79f08c4 has been approved by `mheon`
